title: 淋病令香港網球公開賽延期

replies.msg:
In light of the present situation, Hong Kong Tennis Association and the WTA are announcing a postponement of the 2019 Hong Kong Tennis Open. The event will no longer take place during 5-13 October. We are in active discussion with WTA on identifying an alternate week for the hosting of the event. Further announcement will be made in due course.

We sincerely apologise for any inconvenience caused to our players, fans, partners and supporters. We will announce ticket refund procedures via the event website, www.hktennisopen.hk, on 16 September 2019.

Thank you for your continued support, and we look forward to welcoming you to the Hong Kong Tennis Open soon.

有鑑於近日的情況，香港網球總會及世界女子網球協會宣佈香港網球公開賽2019將延期舉行。賽事將不會於10月5 至13日進行。我們現正與世界女子網球協會商討將賽事安排於另一星期舉行。我們將適時公佈詳情。

我們為對球手、球迷、合作夥伴及支持者帶來的不便，深感抱歉。我們將於2019年9月16日在網站 www.hktennisopen.hk 公佈退票安排。

感謝各位一直以來的支持，我們期待您再次參與香港網球公開賽。


屌你無得睇，柒出國際
睇左咁多年網球都無聽過有atp wta tournaments會postpone
